message:
fix(cursor): update cursor position on zoom in/out/reset

Cell dimensions (cell_width_px, cell_height_px) change on font size
zoom but the cursor re-send condition only checked surface pixel
dimensions and cursor cell position. When the surface stays the same
size and the cursor cell doesn't move, the cursor was never re-sent
despite its pixel position being stale. Track last_cell_w/h and
include cell dimension changes in the re-send condition.
